arts.ttl: Oliver Glasner reveals Dougie Freedman conversation with Crystal Palace sporting director set for Saudi Arabia role
arts.sum: Oliver Glasner admitted that sporting director Dougie Freedman told him it was time for a ‘new challenge’ after announcing his Crystal Palace departure during the international break. “He told me he was considering it,” said Glasner, who is in talks over extending his own deal with the South Londoners.

arts.ttl: Oliver Glasner confirms Crystal Palace goalkeeper decision ahead of Fulham FA Cup clash
arts.sum: The USA keeper had kept two clean sheets in the first two rounds, but Glasner confirmed he will lose his cup starting spot in place of regular number one Henderson. Crystal Palace boss Oliver Glasner has confirmed that Dean Henderson will start tomorrow’s FA Cup clash against Fulham.

arts.ttl: 'My gut feeling is': Chris Sutton predicts Fulham v Crystal Palace scoreline in tomorrow's FA Cup clash
arts.sum: The FA Cup quarter-finals are set to take place this weekend and both Fulham and Crystal Palace will fancy their chances of reaching the semi-finals....

arts.ttl: Fulham boss Marco Silva opens up on "very nice" managerial milestone ahead of Crystal Palace FA Cup clash
arts.sum: Fulham boss Marco Silva opens up on "very nice" managerial milestone ahead of Saturday's FA Cup quarter-final against Crystal Palace.

arts.ttl: Jean-Philippe Mateta to return for Crystal Palace in protective helmet
arts.sum: Striker lacerated ear in incident against Millwall Mateta back for FA Cup quarter-final at Fulham Jean-Philippe Mateta will make his first Crystal Palace appearance on Saturday since being hospitalised with a lacerated ear, with Oliver Glasner confident the striker has not been psychologically affected by the incident. Mateta was kicked in the head by Millwall’s goalkeeper Liam Roberts in the FA Cup fifth round four weeks ago and required 25 stitches. Roberts, who was sent off, received a six-match ban. arts.ttl: Marco Silva hails Fulham transfer as one of their best ever – Highlights biggest victory at Craven Cottage
arts.sum: Marco Silva has admitted he considers Fulham’s signing of Joao Palhinha and his subsequent sale to Bayern Munich as one of the best deals in the club’s history. Silva has been speaking to A Bola in a wide-ranging interview, which the newspaper has released the second part of today. arts.ttl: Jean-Philippe Mateta to wear Petr Cech-style 'water polo helmet' on Crystal Palace return
arts.sum: The Crystal Palace striker will wear the Petr Cech-style head protection against Fulham after needing 25 stitches in his ear in the sixth-round win over Millwall

arts.ttl: Silva aiming to take Fulham closer to ‘dream’ FA Cup final
arts.sum: Marco Silva is determined to take Fulham a step closer to a “dream” FA Cup final 50 years after the club’s last appearance in a domestic final. The Whites face a quarter-final clash with Crystal Palace at Craven Cottage on Saturday.
